mapper.select: /* com.study.board.mapper.BoardMapper.getList */ SELECT BOARD_ID AS BOARDID , TITLE , TEXT , BOARD_DATE AS BOARDDATE , HIT , MEMBER_ID AS MEMBERID FROM BOARD ORDER BY BOARD_DATE DESC

/* com.study.board.mapper.BoardMapper.getContent */
SELECT BOARD_ID AS BOARDID , TITLE , TEXT , BOARD_DATE AS BOARDDATE , HIT , MEMBER_ID AS MEMBERID FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
